title: Implement Selection and Legal Target Highlighting (UI State Update)

content: Decomposed into 1 atomic fragments

Fragment: append-game-js — Update the input handlers to implement Phase 1 (Selection) and Phase 2 (Targeting) logic from the source answer. If the click is valid for selection (piece belongs to current player), set `uiState.selectedSource`. Then, immediately call a placeholder function, `calculateLegalMoves(source, target)`, which currently only checks for basic boundaries but *will* store results in `uiState.legalTargets`. Redraw the canvas to show the yellow highlight on selection and green overlays on legal targets.

**game.js Modification:**
Integrate the full logic structure from the source Q: Input section into `handleInput`, and add the basic highlighting drawing logic to `renderGame`.

Write ONLY the new functions needed. Do NOT rewrite functions that already exist.

title: Implement Queen and King Movement Generation

content: Decomposed into 1 atomic fragments

Fragment: append-game-js — Write the `generateQueenMoves` function by combining the results of `generateBishopMoves` and `generateRookMoves` (Union). Implement `generateKingMoves`, ensuring that all generated King moves, regardless of type, are immediately passed through the `FilterMoveByCheck` algorithm. This step completes the basic move generation framework.

**game.js Modification:**
Add `generateQueenMoves` and `generateKingMoves`. Update the main selection handling in `handleInput` to dispatch to the correct move generator based on the selected piece type.

Write ONLY the new functions needed. Do NOT rewrite functions that already exist.

Fragment: append-game-js — Implement the full, mandatory `FilterMoveByCheck(currentState, source, target)` algorithm. This requires a helper function `isSquareAttacked(state, row, col, attackingColor)` which checks all opposing pieces to see if any can attack the target location. The final move generation function must use this filter on *every single generated* pseudo-move list (Pawn, Knight, Bishop, Rook, Queen, King).

**game.js Modification:**
Add `isSquareAttacked` and `FilterMoveByCheck`. Overwrite the final move generation dispatcher to use this mandatory filter upon building `uiState.legalTargets`.

Write ONLY the new functions needed. Do NOT rewrite functions that already exist.
